title: Create: Cogged Up
description: Mod that adds bunch of new cogs based on materials of Create.
body:
# Create: Cogged Up Create: Cogged Up is an Add-On to the mod Create, which adds lots of new cogs based on Create mod's materials. # !NOTE! Create: Extended Cogwheels is NOT compatible with this mod yet. It will cause minor visual glitches when used together. + Embeddium seems to make encased cogs invisible. planning to make compatibility with both mods but please keep in mind these mods will cause issues with this mod for now ## New Cogwheels The newly added cogs include: Andesite Cogwheel, Copper Cogwheel, Industrial Cogwheel, Brass Cogwheel

See gallery for example usages (beware of terrible sense of decoration)

## Stress Reduction As newly added cogs not only blend in with componants of Create, it also affects gameplay by reducing network stress impact. ![Stress Reductions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/219da5b0d2c2e5d5af9e8c2f7330bde336cacc75.png)

As the picture above implies, Max stress reduction of each cog is following:

Andesite - 2

Copper - 3

Industrial - 4

Brass - 5

Max stress reduction means the stress reduction that is applied to network when _100%_ of cogwheels in your contraption is following material. ![5 presses one waterwheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34cde9b47de98feb073a42e4cca59ab43db3f87a.png) Stress capability of a waterwheel is 256 SU and each of mechanical pressers placed like the picture above impacts 256 SU each. It is possible to attach maximum 5 of them as the max stress reduction of brass cog is 5. But they are completely configurable through commands ### /coggedup stressReductionConfig disable sets all max stress reduction factors for each cogwheels to 1 ### /coggedup stressReductionConfig default sets all max stress reduction factors for each cogwheels to default ### /coggedup stressReductionConfig set <material name in lowercase> <desired number> sets max stress reduction factors for desired number for input material ### /coggedup stressReductionConfig get displays current stress reduction factor status ## Copper Casings For Cogwheels You can now encase cogwheels with copper casings with this mod. They can be applied to every cogwheels except industrial cogwheels. ![Copper Casings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e2a9d331546c2e68edfdc762ae41cd3f1bc166e.png) ## Future Plans I'm planning to add some decorative componants that can blend in with Create's aesthetics. And also new a cog variant comming soon. ## Dependency As the mod being an Add-On of Create, it requires Create as mandatory.
